name: devsecops-agency
description: A fully autonomous AI software-development company in a Claude Code plugin. You speak only to the CEO; the CEO runs 16 councils with blocking and informing chiefs; specialists may spawn workers in parallel. Research-first, security-second, receipts-always. STRIDE + OWASP Top 10 + OWASP ASI Top 10 baseline; SBOM + SLSA per shipped artifact; 8 runtime hooks; 12 Trust commitments; ratified Constitution; cross-model deliberation panel for the highest-stakes decisions. See CHANGELOG.md for full version history.
